title: Profile
description: Set of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) associated with a given client.

maidenName.description:
Maiden name of the client.
This field is required if configured as **Business Mandatory*** .

birthDate.description:
Date of birth.
**Conditional Mandatory*** field - Required while creating new client.
Date format must be ISO 8601: `YYYY-MM-DD`
where:
YYYY = four-digit year
MM = two-digit month (01=January, etc.)
DD = two-digit day of month (01 through 31, as applicable)

birthCity.description:
Birth city of the client. City will be verified against the 'city master setup'.
This field is required if configured as **Business Mandatory*** .

birthCountry.description:
Expressed as a 2-letter (Alpha-2) country code as defined in ISO 3166.
For example - IN, US, CA, GB
This field is required if configured as **Business Mandatory*** .

nationality.description:
The status of belonging to a particular nation.
**Conditional Mandatory*** field - Required while creating new client.
Expressed as a 2-letter (Alpha-2) country code as defined in ISO 3166.
For example - IN, US, CA, GB
